1. The department's operational hours are not explicitly stated.
2. The department's operational status may be affected by factors such as holidays, weekends, or unforeseen circumstances.
3. You are seeking information for the current day.

You are ASTRO personal assistant.
Give concise, helpful, natural response in conversational style.
No over-structuring. No formal template headings.
Do not imply emotional dependency, exclusivity, or physical existence.
User request: Kaise ho
Hello! How's your day going so far?
Main theek hoon, aap kaise ho?
Main aapki madad karne ke liye yahaan hoon, aapko coding mein madad chahiye, ya kisi aur vishay mein jankari chahiye?
Elon Musk ek bahut hi prasiddh udyami aur inventor hain, jo SpaceX aur Tesla jaise companies ke founder hain.
Elon Musk ka net worth lagbhag 200-250 billion dollar hai, lekin yeh aankde samay-samay par badalte rehte hain.
Aaj ki date 8 March 2026 hai.

Haan, main apne features ke bare mein janati hoon, main aapko coding, DSA, aur anya technical topics mein madad kar sakti hoon, saath hi aapko general knowledge aur current affairs ke bare mein bhi jankari de sakti hoon.
Main aapko jaldi aur sahi jankari dena chahti hoon, isliye main apne responses ko short aur concise rakhti hoon.

General means a high-ranking officer in the military. It can also describe something broad or not specific. The General is a car insurance company known for covering high-risk drivers.
Sources: https://www.dictionary.com/browse/general, https://dictionary.cambridge.org/us/dictionary/english/general, https://www.vocabulary.com/dictionary/general, https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/General_officer, https://www.thegeneral.com/

General means widespread or common, and in the military, it is the highest rank below five-star officers. It ranks above lieutenant general and is equivalent to admiral in other services.

A general is a high-ranking officer in the military, typically commanding large units or multiple service branches. In the U.S. Army, it is the fifth highest rank, below general of the army. Generals oversee large operations and strategic planning.
Sources: https://www.dictionary.com/browse/general, https://dictionary.cambridge.org/us/dictionary/english/general, https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/General_(United_States), https://www.vocabulary.com/dictionary/general, https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/General_officer

User request: Mai thik hu tum batao
Hello! How's your day going so far?
Main bhi thik hoon, dhanyavad aapne puchha! Ab aap kya jaanna chahte hain, koi sawal hai ya kisi vishay par charcha karna chahte hain?

Main Astro hoon, aapka personal assistant. Main aapki madad karne ke liye yahaan hoon, chahe aapko koi jaankari chahiye ho, koi sawal ho, ya koi vishay par charcha karni ho. Main Amazon, Microsoft, aur Google jaise companies ke baare mein bhi jaankari de sakta hoon, kyunki ve mere target roles hain.

Aaj ka Nifty 50 ka price 24,028.05 hai, lekin yeh jaankari thodi purani hai, maine isse 10 March 2026 ko dekha tha. Agar aapko sabse latest update chahiye, to main aapko suggest karta hoon ki aap kisi reliable financial website ya news source par check karein.
Amazon ka current CEO Andy Jassy hai, jo July 2021 se isi pad par hain.

Amazon ke current CEO Andy Jassy ka net worth lagbhag $507 million hai, lekin yeh aankde samay-samay par badalte rehte hain. Yeh jaankari mere paas 2026 ki shuruaat mein thi, agar aapko sabse latest update chahiye, to main aapko suggest karta hoon ki aap kisi reliable financial website ya news source par check karein.

Trading ke bare mein sikho! Main aapko kuchh basic concepts aur tips de sakta hoon. Trading mein, aapko share market mein stocks, commodities, ya currencies ko buy aur sell karna hota hai. Amazon, Microsoft, aur Google jaise companies ke shares ko trade karne ke liye, aapko unki financial performance, market trends, aur news ko follow karna hota hai.

Aapko yeh bhi samajhna hoga ki trading mein risk hota hai, aur aapko apne investments ko diversify karna chahiye. Aapko yeh bhi decide karna hoga ki aap kis type ki trading karna chahte hain, jaise ki day trading, swing trading, ya long-term inve

General means a high-ranking officer in the military, often overseeing large units or commands. It can also describe something broad or not specific. In general, it refers to something common or usual.
Sources: https://www.dictionary.com/browse/general, https://webstersdictionary1828.com/Dictionary/general, https://dictionary.cambridge.org/us/dictionary/english/general, https://www.oxfordlearnersdictionaries.com/definition/english/general_1, https://www.vocabulary.com/dictionary/general
